codeReview.summary: Manual scrutiny review found the dispatch replay follow-up stayed tightly scoped to the remaining PR #97 edge case: `DispatchController`, `SalesController`, and `DispatchMetadataValidator` were adjusted so already-dispatched slip replays reach the replay-safe branch before fresh metadata enforcement, and `SalesControllerIdempotencyHeaderTest` was expanded to pin that behavior. Fresh-dispatch metadata validation remains in place, so the packet passes on reachable commit `33d9ba4f601bdf1694bf9f9dfff4b8fd2a8a3430` (`fix(o2c): preserve dispatched-slip replay path before metadata checks`).

summary: Pass. Already-dispatched slip retries bypass fresh metadata checks as intended on commit `33d9ba4f601bdf1694bf9f9dfff4b8fd2a8a3430`, without weakening the new-dispatch contract.
